name: fontfetch
title: fontfetch
description: Extract every web font from any site — CSS to clipboard, audit verdict in your menu bar.
author: niyamvora

commands.name: fontfetch-extract
commands.title: Extract Fonts from URL
commands.subtitle: fontfetch
commands.description: Paste a URL, get the @font-face CSS + per-family file list. CSS copied to clipboard.

commands.name: fontfetch-audit
commands.title: Audit URL
commands.subtitle: fontfetch
commands.description: Run fontfetch audit and surface the budget verdict in a HUD.

commands.name: fontfetch-search-pairings
commands.title: Search Font Pairings
commands.subtitle: fontfetch
commands.description: Search the community pairings registry by family or tag. Find free OFL alternatives to commercial fonts.
